content.en:
During this period of time, Hamoro's strength recovered a lot, and then he hid his body and went out of this void.

He didn't interfere with the slumber of other Ancient Demons or Ultimate Ancient Demons, and once he woke up an Ancient Demon and caused a fight, even if he attacked and killed the other Ancient Demons, he would provoke the wrath of the sleeping Ultimate Ancient Demon and kill him.

The fact that he was able to wake up first was not because of his strength, but because the injury was not too serious at the beginning, and he was weak, so he would recover quickly.

Swish!

He left the place in hiding without causing any disturbances.

Immediately afterward, he began to wander through the ultimate worlds, perceiving the cultivators of this era, and immediately frowned.

"This era is too weak, and it seems that there are not even many Ultimate Extreme Masters comparable to the ancient demon level. Hamoro shook his head, he never thought that after countless ancient demon eras, this world would become so weak.

this day.

Hamoro came to the Dimensional Ancient Sea, and was immediately attracted by the formation here.

"Hey, is there still an Ultimate Supreme in this era who can arrange such a large array?"

Hamorro was shocked.

Immediately after, his face changed, and he was able to arrange the ultimate supreme of 26 such a large array, and his strength was afraid to be extremely terrifying, and he might be able to find him.

Really.

A terrifying aura locked onto him.

"A peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who has just awakened!"

Ye Tian walked out of the void, staring at Hamoro, his heart was full of interest, he wanted to learn some secrets from Hamoro.

For example, why did these Ancient Demon-level powerhouses and Ultimate Ancient Demons sleep, why was the Endless Space-Time Domain shattered, and why was the Endless Time-Space Line destroyed?

Rumble!!!!

Hamoro made a move, and he could also see that Ye Tian's cultivation was only the pinnacle ultimate supreme, which was comparable to his realm, but he was the kind that reached the extreme in the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse realm, otherwise he would not be able to survive in such a big battle.

Maybe he was weaker than the other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses who survived that era, but there weren't many ultimate supremes in this era, and the resources were still so poor, how could he cultivate any powerhouses?

He was sure to kill Ye Tian.

However, when his attack landed on Ye Tian's body, he was directly blocked by the Time Sword Cover.

Immediately after, Hamoro found that a prison had appeared around him, and it was Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane Dark Prison!

With the blessing of the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, this dark prison is very strong.

Thundered!!!!

Hamoro kept attacking, but he couldn't help this dark prison.

At this moment, Hamoro panicked.

Ye Tian's strength was completely beyond his expectations, and he was afraid that it was no less than the ultimate ancient demon.

And at this moment, a sword blade light appeared in Ye Tian's hand, and that sword blade light contained terrifying power, as if it could kill him in an instant.

"I throw in the towel!"

Hamoro begged for mercy.

Ye Tian stopped, it was easy for him to kill Hamorro, but it was no good to kill him, the most important thing was to know the truth from Hamoro's mouth.

"I want to know why so many of your Ultimate Ancient Demons and Peak Ancient Demons are sleeping in that area?" Ye Tian asked.

Hamoro hurriedly said: "It's because of a catastrophe!"

"The final catastrophe?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Not really. Hamoro said, "If it is the final catastrophe, we will all die." It was just an end-of-life tribulation, but that end-of-life tribulation was very terrifying, a large number of ancient demons and even the ultimate ancient demons couldn't control themselves and killed them, and a terrifying end-of-life thing was born, and a large number of strong people fell. In the end, all the Ancient Demon-level powerhouses and Ultimate Ancient Demons joined forces to control a large array to kill each other, and in the end, the final thing was killed, but the origin of many Ultimate Ancient Demons and Ancient Demon-level powerhouses was hit hard, their wills were almost destroyed, and the heavens and the earth were destroyed, and the endless space-time line also collapsed. What's more, the final catastrophe has not really passed, in order not to be affected by the final catastrophe, we all took the initiative to sleep and ban ourselves, so that we completely avoided this final catastrophe!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

But this is not good news, because the final catastrophe has not yet come, and if it does, how can he survive it with his strength?

"Do you have what it takes to survive the final catastrophe?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Senior, I'm just a peak ancient demon level, I don't know!" Hamoro said.

"That's right!"

Ye Tian shook his head, he even expected a peak Ancient Demon level to know how to survive the Final Tribulation, and the other party could know that the Final Tribulation was still heard from the mouth of the Ultimate Ancient Demon.

Ye Tian asked again.

Hamoro said: "It shouldn't be too long, although those Ultimate Ancient Demons are the most seriously injured and have a slower recovery, but I sensed it before, their injuries have recovered about the same, and when their injuries are recovered, they will automatically lift the ban." "

"What tribe do you belong to?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Harvey's main department!"

Hamorrow Road.

"Tell me about the strength and names of those Ultimate 007 Ancient Demons. "

Ye Tian asked.

Hamoro didn't dare to disobey, and directly revealed the strength and names of those ultimate ancient demons.

After Ye Tian heard this, he felt that the names of many Ultimate Ancient Demons were very familiar, and some of them were some peak Ancient Demons that he had entered that time and space, and later became Ultimate Ancient Demons.

And the name of one of the top Ultimate Ancient Demons was very familiar to Ye Tian - Stygian Ancient Demon!

"Stygian Demons!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised that the other party had become the top ultimate ancient demon.

However, in the real time and space, the Stygian Ancient Demon didn't know him, and the two sides didn't have any intersection, so naturally they weren't friends.

If it is, it is the enemy. []

After that, Ye Tian asked many more things, and Hamoro answered them one by one.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to think about how to deal with Hamorro.

Kill?

It's not good, once you kill Hamoro, you will offend the main department behind Hamoro, as well as other ancient demons.

Perhaps, it will arouse the anger of the entire Ancient Demon Clan.

So, can't be killed.

"I don't want to kill you, but you have been cultivating honestly during these years, and you are not allowed to make trouble. Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Hamoro breathed a sigh of relief, he thought he was really going to die, but he didn't expect Ye Tian not to kill him.
